## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build` (type-check + library build)
- [ ] If Zod schemas or `scripts/generate-catalog.ts` changed: ran `pnpm generate:catalog` and reviewed `catalog/vuetify-catalog.json` diffs

## Documentation
